AccountCf1GatewayDns1dGroups.__description: CF1 Gateway DNS analytics - 1 day rollup
AccountCf1GatewayDns1dGroups.dimensions: List of dimensions to group by

AccountCf1GatewayDns1dGroupsDimensions.deviceId: Device ID. Requires the #teams:pii (legacy) or com.cloudflare.team.gateway.pii.read (Bach) permission; otherwise returned as the literal \"REDACTED\"
AccountCf1GatewayDns1dGroupsDimensions.edeErrors: Union of EDE codes observed in the group (rollup of raw edeErrors via groupUniqArrayArray; sorted ascending for deterministic output)
AccountCf1GatewayDns1dGroupsDimensions.email: User email address. Requires the #teams:pii (legacy) or com.cloudflare.team.gateway.pii.read (Bach) permission; otherwise returned as the literal \"REDACTED\"
AccountCf1GatewayDns1dGroupsDimensions.matchedCategoryIds: Union of matched categories observed in the group (rollup of raw matchedCategoryIds via groupUniqArrayArray; sorted ascending for deterministic output)
AccountCf1GatewayDns1dGroupsDimensions.queryApplicationIds: Union of application IDs observed in the group (rollup of raw queryApplicationIds via groupUniqArrayArray; sorted ascending for deterministic output)
AccountCf1GatewayDns1dGroupsDimensions.queryCategoryIds: Union of query categories observed in the group (rollup of raw queryCategoryIds via groupUniqArrayArray; sorted ascending for deterministic output)
AccountCf1GatewayDns1dGroupsDimensions.resolverDecision: Gateway resolver decision. To filter for all "block" outcomes, use resolverDecision_in with ["blockedRule", "blockedByQueryName", "blockedByCategory"]. Other values: allowedOnNoPolicyMatch, allowedOnPolicyMatch, allowedByQueryName, overrideRule, safesearchRule, ytRestrictedModeRule, allowedOnNoLocation, allowedOnNoRule, overrideOnlyRule.
AccountCf1GatewayDns1dGroupsDimensions.sourceIP: Source IP address. Requires the #teams:pii (legacy) or com.cloudflare.team.gateway.pii.read (Bach) permission; otherwise returned as the literal \"REDACTED\"

AccountCf1GatewayDns1dGroupsSum.edeErrorArray: EDE codes observed in the group, for EDE Codes Over Time. Elements correspond to edeErrorCountArray by index.
AccountCf1GatewayDns1dGroupsSum.edeErrorCountArray: Query counts per EDE code. Elements correspond to edeErrorArray by index.
AccountCf1GatewayDns1dGroupsSum.queryApplicationIdArray: Application IDs observed in the group, for Top Apps by query count. Elements correspond to queryApplicationIdCountArray by index.
AccountCf1GatewayDns1dGroupsSum.queryApplicationIdCountArray: Query counts per application ID. Elements correspond to queryApplicationIdArray by index.
AccountCf1GatewayDns1dGroupsSum.queryCategoryIdArray: Query-category IDs observed in the group, for DNS Queries by Category. Elements correspond to queryCategoryIdCountArray by index.
AccountCf1GatewayDns1dGroupsSum.queryCategoryIdCountArray: Query counts per query-category ID. Elements correspond to queryCategoryIdArray by index.
AccountCf1GatewayDns1dGroupsSum.topQueryNameCounts: Query counts for topQueryNames, most frequent first. Elements correspond to topQueryNames by index.
AccountCf1GatewayDns1dGroupsSum.topQueryNames: Top query names (hostnames) by query count, most frequent first (up to 100; backed by a stored top-1000 approx_top_k for merge accuracy). Elements correspond to topQueryNameCounts by index.

AccountHttpRequestsAdaptive.__description: Raw HTTP requests with adaptive sampling

AccountHttpRequestsAdaptive.contentScanObjSizes: Array of scan sizes in order of detection

AccountHttpRequestsAdaptive.datetimeMinute: The date and time the event occurred at the edge truncated to the minute
AccountHttpRequestsAdaptive.edgeDnsResponseTimeMs: The time elapsed resolving a CNAME if it was required to reach your origin

AccountHttpRequestsAdaptive.fraudDetectionTags: Array of fraud detections tags that matched this request

AccountHttpRequestsAdaptive.originTlsHandshakeDurationMs: The time elapsed between the start and completion of the TLS handshake with the origin

AccountHttpRequestsAdaptiveGroupsSum.botDetectionIdArray: Array of bot management detection ids
AccountHttpRequestsAdaptiveGroupsSum.botDetectionIdCountArray: Count array of bot management detection ids. Elements in this array correspond to elements in botDetectionIdArray by index.
AccountHttpRequestsAdaptiveGroupsSum.botDetectionIdResponseBytesArray: Bytes array of bot management detection ids. Elements in this array correspond to elements in botDetectionIdArray by index.
AccountHttpRequestsAdaptiveGroupsSum.botDetectionTagArray: Array of bot management detection tags
AccountHttpRequestsAdaptiveGroupsSum.botDetectionTagCountArray: Count array of bot management detection tags. Elements in this array correspond to elements in botDetectionTagArray by index.
AccountHttpRequestsAdaptiveGroupsSum.clientRequestAcceptContentTypeCategoryAr: Array of Accept content type category slugs (e.g. html, json, images) aggregated independently across requests, ordered by request count descending and capped at 50 entries. Each category is counted separately — a request accepting both text/html and application/json contributes to both html and json totals.
AccountHttpRequestsAdaptiveGroupsSum.clientRequestAcceptContentTypeCategoryCo: Count array of per-category Accept content type aggregations, ordered by request count descending and capped at 50 entries. Elements correspond to clientRequestAcceptContentTypeCategoryArray by index. Each count represents the total number of requests that included any MIME type belonging to that category in their Accept header.
AccountHttpRequestsAdaptiveGroupsSum.crossZoneSubrequests: The number of requests that were inititiated by a Cloudflare Worker on another zone
AccountHttpRequestsAdaptiveGroupsSum.fraudDetectionIdCountArray: Count array of fraud detection ids. Elements in this array correspond to elements in fraudDetectionIdArray by index.
AccountHttpRequestsAdaptiveGroupsSum.fraudDetectionTagCountArray: Count array of fraud detection tags. Elements in this array correspond to elements in fraudDetectionTagArray by index.
AccountHttpRequestsAdaptiveGroupsSum.originResponseHeaderReceiveDurationMs: The sum of originResponseHeaderReceiveDuration, in milliseconds
AccountHttpRequestsAdaptiveGroupsSum.originTcpHandshakeDurationMs: The sum of originTcpHandshakeDuration, in milliseconds
AccountHttpRequestsAdaptiveGroupsSum.originTlsHandshakeDurationMs: The sum of originTlsHandshakeDuration, in milliseconds
AccountHttpRequestsAdaptiveGroupsSum.productMatchProductArray: Distinct Cloudflare product IDs whose rulesets matched across aggregated requests
AccountHttpRequestsAdaptiveGroupsSum.productMatchProductCountArray: Estimated request count per product ID. Elements correspond to productMatchProductArray by index.
AccountHttpRequestsAdaptiveGroupsSum.productMatchRulesetIdArray: Distinct ruleset UUIDs (hex-encoded) that matched across aggregated requests
AccountHttpRequestsAdaptiveGroupsSum.productMatchRulesetIdCountArray: Estimated request count per ruleset ID. Elements correspond to productMatchRulesetIdArray by index.
AccountHttpRequestsAdaptiveGroupsSum.rulesMetadataKeyArray: Distinct rule metadata keys observed across aggregated requests
AccountHttpRequestsAdaptiveGroupsSum.rulesMetadataKeyCountArray: Estimated request count per metadata key. Elements correspond to rulesMetadataKeyArray by index.
AccountHttpRequestsAdaptiveGroupsSum.visits: The number of requests by end-users that were initiated from a different website (i.e. where the request HTTP Referer header does not match the host in the HTTP Host header)

AccountLogpushHealthAdaptiveGroupsDimens.final: Cloudflare may attempt to push a batch of logs multiple times if we encounter a failure. This field will be set to 1 if this was the last push attempt for this batch of logs. If this field is set to 0, it means the push failed but another retry was attempted. If this field is set to 1 and status >= 300, then the batch of logs failed to push and log data was lost. If you want to count the total number of logs that succeeded or failed, you should always set final = 1.

AccountMnmAWSVPCFlowDataAdaptiveGroupsDi.accountID: The AWS account ID of the owner of the source network interface for which traffic is recorded.
AccountMnmAWSVPCFlowDataAdaptiveGroupsDi.action: The action that is associated with the traffic: ACCEPT, REJECT.
AccountMnmAWSVPCFlowDataAdaptiveGroupsDi.azID: The ID of the Availability Zone that contains the network interface for which traffic is recorded.
AccountMnmAWSVPCFlowDataAdaptiveGroupsDi.date: Date that the packet was received
AccountMnmAWSVPCFlowDataAdaptiveGroupsDi.datetime: Date and time that the packet was received
AccountMnmAWSVPCFlowDataAdaptiveGroupsDi.datetimeFifteenMinutes: Date and time that the packet was received, rounded to the start of the nearest fifteen minutes
AccountMnmAWSVPCFlowDataAdaptiveGroupsDi.datetimeFiveMinutes: Date and time that the packet was received, rounded to the start of the nearest five minutes
AccountMnmAWSVPCFlowDataAdaptiveGroupsDi.datetimeHour: Date and time that the packet was received, rounded to the start of the nearest hour
AccountMnmAWSVPCFlowDataAdaptiveGroupsDi.datetimeMinute: Date and time that the packet was received, rounded to the start of the nearest minute
AccountMnmAWSVPCFlowDataAdaptiveGroupsDi.datetimeTenSeconds: Date and time that the packet was received, rounded to the start of the nearest ten seconds
AccountMnmAWSVPCFlowDataAdaptiveGroupsDi.destinationAddress: IP to which the data was sent
AccountMnmAWSVPCFlowDataAdaptiveGroupsDi.destinationPort: Value of the Destination Port header field in the packet
AccountMnmAWSVPCFlowDataAdaptiveGroupsDi.ecsClusterArn: AWS Resource Name (ARN) of the ECS cluster if the traffic is from a running ECS task.
AccountMnmAWSVPCFlowDataAdaptiveGroupsDi.ecsClusterName: Name of the ECS cluster if the traffic is from a running ECS task.
AccountMnmAWSVPCFlowDataAdaptiveGroupsDi.ecsContainerID: Docker runtime ID of the container if the traffic is from a running ECS task.
AccountMnmAWSVPCFlowDataAdaptiveGroupsDi.ecsContainerInstanceArn: ARN of the ECS container instance if the traffic is from a running ECS task on an EC2 instance.
AccountMnmAWSVPCFlowDataAdaptiveGroupsDi.ecsContainerInstanceID: ID of the ECS container instance if the traffic is from a running ECS task on an EC2 instance.
AccountMnmAWSVPCFlowDataAdaptiveGroupsDi.ecsSecondContainerID: Docker runtime ID of the second container if the traffic is from a running ECS task.
AccountMnmAWSVPCFlowDataAdaptiveGroupsDi.ecsServiceName: Name of the ECS service if the traffic is from a running ECS task and the ECS task is started by an ECS service.
AccountMnmAWSVPCFlowDataAdaptiveGroupsDi.ecsTaskArn: ARN of the ECS task if the traffic is from a running ECS task.
AccountMnmAWSVPCFlowDataAdaptiveGroupsDi.ecsTaskDefinitionArn: ARN of the ECS task definition if the traffic is from a running ECS task.
AccountMnmAWSVPCFlowDataAdaptiveGroupsDi.ecsTaskID: ID of the ECS task if the traffic is from a running ECS task.
AccountMnmAWSVPCFlowDataAdaptiveGroupsDi.end: The time, in Unix seconds, when the last packet of the flow was received within the aggregation interval.
AccountMnmAWSVPCFlowDataAdaptiveGroupsDi.ethertype: Value of the Ethertype header field in the Ethernet packet (2048 for IPv4; 34525 for IPv6)
AccountMnmAWSVPCFlowDataAdaptiveGroupsDi.firehoseStream: Identification of the AWS firehose stream exporting flows
AccountMnmAWSVPCFlowDataAdaptiveGroupsDi.flowDirection: The direction of the flow with respect to the interface where traffic is captured.
AccountMnmAWSVPCFlowDataAdaptiveGroupsDi.instanceID: The ID of the instance that's associated with the network interface for which the traffic is recorded.
AccountMnmAWSVPCFlowDataAdaptiveGroupsDi.interfaceID: The ID of the network interface for which the traffic is recorded.
AccountMnmAWSVPCFlowDataAdaptiveGroupsDi.logStatus: The logging status of the flow log: OK, NODATA, SKIPDATA.
AccountMnmAWSVPCFlowDataAdaptiveGroupsDi.pktDestinationAddress: The packet-level (original) destination IP address for the traffic.
AccountMnmAWSVPCFlowDataAdaptiveGroupsDi.pktDstAwsService: The name of the subset of IP address ranges for the pktDstaddr field, if the destination IP address is for an AWS service.
AccountMnmAWSVPCFlowDataAdaptiveGroupsDi.pktSourceAddress: The packet-level (original) source IP address of the traffic.
AccountMnmAWSVPCFlowDataAdaptiveGroupsDi.pktSrcAwsService: The name of the subset of IP address ranges for the pktSrcaddr field, if the source IP address is for an AWS service.
AccountMnmAWSVPCFlowDataAdaptiveGroupsDi.protocolString: Human-readable string representation of the protocol
AccountMnmAWSVPCFlowDataAdaptiveGroupsDi.region: The Region that contains the network interface for which traffic is recorded.
AccountMnmAWSVPCFlowDataAdaptiveGroupsDi.sourceAddress: IP from which the data was sent
AccountMnmAWSVPCFlowDataAdaptiveGroupsDi.sourcePort: Value of the Source Port header field in the packet
AccountMnmAWSVPCFlowDataAdaptiveGroupsDi.start: The time, in Unix seconds, when the first packet of the flow was received within the aggregation interval.
AccountMnmAWSVPCFlowDataAdaptiveGroupsDi.sublocationID: The ID of the sublocation that contains the network interface for which traffic is recorded.
AccountMnmAWSVPCFlowDataAdaptiveGroupsDi.sublocationType: The type of sublocation that's returned in the sublocationID field.
AccountMnmAWSVPCFlowDataAdaptiveGroupsDi.subnetID: The ID of the subnet that contains the network interface for which the traffic is recorded.
AccountMnmAWSVPCFlowDataAdaptiveGroupsDi.tcpFlags: Value of the Flags header field in the TCP packet
AccountMnmAWSVPCFlowDataAdaptiveGroupsDi.tcpFlagsString: Human-readable string representation of the Flags header field in the TCP packet
AccountMnmAWSVPCFlowDataAdaptiveGroupsDi.trafficPath: The path that egress traffic takes to the destination.
AccountMnmAWSVPCFlowDataAdaptiveGroupsDi.vpcID: The ID of the VPC that contains the network interface for which the traffic is recorded.

OrganizationHttpRequestsAdaptiveGroupsDi.firewallForAiUnsafeTopicCategories: Corresponds to the Ruleset field cf.llm.prompt.unsafe_data_categories.
OrganizationHttpRequestsAdaptiveGroupsDi.fraudAttack: The primary attack or use case detected in the request by Fraud detections
OrganizationHttpRequestsAdaptiveGroupsDi.fraudDetectionIds: Array of fraud detections ids that matched this request
OrganizationHttpRequestsAdaptiveGroupsDi.fraudDetectionTags: Array of fraud detections tags that matched this request
OrganizationHttpRequestsAdaptiveGroupsDi.fraudEmailRisk: Risk of a specific email address in account signup attempts
OrganizationHttpRequestsAdaptiveGroupsDi.fraudEventType: Identifies action that a given user is performing. Possible values are login, signup.
OrganizationHttpRequestsAdaptiveGroupsDi.fraudUserId: A unique identifier generated by the Fraud Detection system for each user, generated during any action determined by the fraud event type.
OrganizationHttpRequestsAdaptiveGroupsDi.httpApplicationVersion: DEPRECATED (Field is replaced with zoneVersion): Version associated with HTTP Application
OrganizationHttpRequestsAdaptiveGroupsDi.isCrossZoneSubrequest: '1' if a request was inititiated by a Cloudflare Worker on another zone; '0' otherwise.
OrganizationHttpRequestsAdaptiveGroupsDi.ja3Hash: MD5 hash of the JA3 TLS fingerprint
OrganizationHttpRequestsAdaptiveGroupsDi.jsDetectionPassed: Whether the request passed background JavaScript Detection
OrganizationHttpRequestsAdaptiveGroupsDi.leakedCredentialCheckResult: The distinct result of checking for leaked credentials
OrganizationHttpRequestsAdaptiveGroupsDi.originResponseHeaderReceiveDurationMs: The time elapsed between completing the TLS handshake and receiving the origin response headers
OrganizationHttpRequestsAdaptiveGroupsDi.originResponseStatus: HTTP response status code returned by the origin
OrganizationHttpRequestsAdaptiveGroupsDi.originTcpHandshakeDurationMs: The time elapsed between the start and completion of the TCP handshake with the origin
OrganizationHttpRequestsAdaptiveGroupsDi.originTlsHandshakeDurationMs: The time elapsed between the start and completion of the TLS handshake with the origin
OrganizationHttpRequestsAdaptiveGroupsDi.payPerCrawlStatus: Pay Per Crawl outcome, when applicable (e.g. request enabled for charging and not blocked by a WAF rule)
OrganizationHttpRequestsAdaptiveGroupsDi.schemaValidationLearnedOutcome: The outcome of running API Shield Managed Schema Validation for this request against the Cloudflare-learned schema (e.g. valid or violated; empty when managed schema validation did not run for the request)
OrganizationHttpRequestsAdaptiveGroupsDi.schemaValidationUploadedOutcome: The outcome of running API Shield Schema Validation for this request against the customer-uploaded schema (e.g. valid or violated; empty when schema validation did not run for the request)
OrganizationHttpRequestsAdaptiveGroupsDi.securityAction: The code of the first-class action the Cloudflare Firewall took on this request
OrganizationHttpRequestsAdaptiveGroupsDi.securitySource: The Cloudflare security product triggered by this request
OrganizationHttpRequestsAdaptiveGroupsDi.threatIntelIpDatasets: Threat Intelligence dataset(s) that matched the visitor IP address (e.g. ddos, waf)
OrganizationHttpRequestsAdaptiveGroupsDi.threatIntelIpEventIds: UUIDv4 identifiers linking to Threat Intelligence events that matched the visitor IP address
OrganizationHttpRequestsAdaptiveGroupsDi.userAgentBrowser: Browser parsed from the user agent
OrganizationHttpRequestsAdaptiveGroupsDi.userAgentOS: OS parsed from the user agent
OrganizationHttpRequestsAdaptiveGroupsDi.wafAttackScore: Beta. Overall request score generated by the WAF detection module
OrganizationHttpRequestsAdaptiveGroupsDi.wafAttackScoreClass: Beta. Overall request score class generated by the WAF detection module
OrganizationHttpRequestsAdaptiveGroupsDi.wafPathTraversalAttackScore: Beta. WAF score for a Path Traversal attack
OrganizationHttpRequestsAdaptiveGroupsDi.wafRceAttackScore: Beta. WAF score for a RCE attack
OrganizationHttpRequestsAdaptiveGroupsDi.wafRequestSignatureCategories: 1-D array of the categories associated with the rules ref in wafRequestSignatureRefs

OrganizationHttpRequestsAdaptiveGroupsDi.wafSqliAttackScore: Beta. WAF score for a SQLi attack

OrganizationHttpRequestsAdaptiveGroupsDi.xRequestedWith: The X-Requested-With header of the client request

OrganizationHttpRequestsAdaptiveGroupsQu.originResponseHeaderReceiveDurationMsP25: 25th percentile Origin Response Header Receive Duration (milliseconds)
OrganizationHttpRequestsAdaptiveGroupsQu.originResponseHeaderReceiveDurationMsP50: 50th percentile Origin Response Header Receive Duration (milliseconds)

OrganizationHttpRequestsAdaptiveGroupsSu.clientRequestAcceptContentTypeCategoryAr: Array of Accept content type category slugs (e.g. html, json, images) aggregated independently across requests, ordered by request count descending and capped at 50 entries. Each category is counted separately — a request accepting both text/html and application/json contributes to both html and json totals.
OrganizationHttpRequestsAdaptiveGroupsSu.clientRequestAcceptContentTypeCategoryCo: Count array of per-category Accept content type aggregations, ordered by request count descending and capped at 50 entries. Elements correspond to clientRequestAcceptContentTypeCategoryArray by index. Each count represents the total number of requests that included any MIME type belonging to that category in their Accept header.
OrganizationHttpRequestsAdaptiveGroupsSu.crossZoneSubrequests: The number of requests that were inititiated by a Cloudflare Worker on another zone
OrganizationHttpRequestsAdaptiveGroupsSu.fraudDetectionIdCountArray: Count array of fraud detection ids. Elements in this array correspond to elements in fraudDetectionIdArray by index.
OrganizationHttpRequestsAdaptiveGroupsSu.fraudDetectionTagCountArray: Count array of fraud detection tags. Elements in this array correspond to elements in fraudDetectionTagArray by index.
OrganizationHttpRequestsAdaptiveGroupsSu.originResponseHeaderReceiveDurationMs: The sum of originResponseHeaderReceiveDuration, in milliseconds
OrganizationHttpRequestsAdaptiveGroupsSu.originTcpHandshakeDurationMs: The sum of originTcpHandshakeDuration, in milliseconds
OrganizationHttpRequestsAdaptiveGroupsSu.originTlsHandshakeDurationMs: The sum of originTlsHandshakeDuration, in milliseconds
OrganizationHttpRequestsAdaptiveGroupsSu.visits: The number of requests by end-users that were initiated from a different website (i.e. where the request HTTP Referer header does not match the host in the HTTP Host header)

ZoneApiRequestSequencesGroups.__description: Sequences of API endpoint operations. Sequences are learned by grouping requests by AuthID. Correlation scores are estimated over a 24 hour window and are current to within 10 minutes
ZoneApiRequestSequencesGroups.dimensions: List of dimensions to group by

ZoneApiRequestSequencesGroupsAggArgMax.correlation: Correlation score estimated over a 24 hour window. The correlation score is the probability that the last operation in the sequence is preceded by the remaining operations in the sequence, assuming that the last operation in the sequence occurred
ZoneApiRequestSequencesGroupsAggArgMax.numOccurrences: Estimated number of occurrences of this sequence of endpoint operations
ZoneApiRequestSequencesGroupsAggArgMax.numOccurrencesLast: Estimated number of occurrences of the last operation in this sequence of endpoint operations
ZoneApiRequestSequencesGroupsAggArgMax.numOccurrencesPrefix: Estimated number of occurrences of this sequence of endpoint operations, disregarding the last operation
ZoneApiRequestSequencesGroupsAggArgMax.numOccurrencesSuffix: DEPRECATED (Field is not guaranteed to be always populated for sequences of length greater than 2. Use numOccurrencesLast instead): Estimated number of occurrences of this sequence of endpoint operations, disregarding the first operation
ZoneApiRequestSequencesGroupsAggArgMax.operationsApiEndpoints: API endpoints in the sequence of operations. Individual endpoints are delimited by # symbols
ZoneApiRequestSequencesGroupsAggArgMax.operationsClientRequestHTTPMethods: HTTP request methods in the sequence of operations. Individual request method names are delimited by # symbols

ZoneApiRequestSequencesGroupsAggMax.timeLastSeen: Time of the most recent occurrence of this sequence of endpoint operations (based on the timestamp of the first request in the sequence)
ZoneApiRequestSequencesGroupsAggMax.timeLastUpdated: The time at which Cloudflare last refreshed this data

ZoneApiRequestSequencesGroupsDimensions.apiHost: The host associated with this sequence of endpoint operations
ZoneApiRequestSequencesGroupsDimensions.clientRequestHTTPHost: DEPRECATED (Field is replaced with apiHost): The host associated with this sequence of endpoint operations
ZoneApiRequestSequencesGroupsDimensions.datetime: Sequence generation timeslot, truncated to 10 minutes
ZoneApiRequestSequencesGroupsDimensions.operationsFirstApiEndpoint: First API endpoint in the sequence of operations
ZoneApiRequestSequencesGroupsDimensions.operationsFirstClientRequestHTTPMethod: First HTTP request method in the sequence of operations
ZoneApiRequestSequencesGroupsDimensions.operationsLastApiEndpoint: Last API endpoint in the sequence of operations
ZoneApiRequestSequencesGroupsDimensions.operationsLastClientRequestHTTPMethod: Last HTTP request method in the sequence of operations
ZoneApiRequestSequencesGroupsDimensions.operationsLength: Length of the sequence of operations
ZoneApiRequestSequencesGroupsDimensions.operationsPrefixApiEndpoints: API endpoints in the sequence of operations, disregarding the last operation. Individual endpoints are delimited by # symbols
ZoneApiRequestSequencesGroupsDimensions.operationsPrefixClientRequestHTTPMethods: HTTP request methods in the sequence of operations, disregarding the last operation. Individual request method names are delimited by # symbols
ZoneApiRequestSequencesGroupsDimensions.rank: DEPRECATED (Field is replaced with sequenceHash serving as unique sequence identifier): Sequence rank based on ordering sequences by correlation
ZoneApiRequestSequencesGroupsDimensions.sequenceHash: Unique sequence identifier obtained by hashing operationsApiEndpoints and operationsClientRequestHTTPMethods

ZoneHttpRequestsAdaptiveGroupsSum.clientRequestAcceptContentTypeCategoryAr: Array of Accept content type category slugs (e.g. html, json, images) aggregated independently across requests, ordered by request count descending and capped at 50 entries. Each category is counted separately — a request accepting both text/html and application/json contributes to both html and json totals.
ZoneHttpRequestsAdaptiveGroupsSum.clientRequestAcceptContentTypeCategoryCo: Count array of per-category Accept content type aggregations, ordered by request count descending and capped at 50 entries. Elements correspond to clientRequestAcceptContentTypeCategoryArray by index. Each count represents the total number of requests that included any MIME type belonging to that category in their Accept header.

ZoneLogpushHealthAdaptiveGroupsDimension.final: Cloudflare may attempt to push a batch of logs multiple times if we encounter a failure. This field will be set to 1 if this was the last push attempt for this batch of logs. If this field is set to 0, it means the push failed but another retry was attempted. If this field is set to 1 and status >= 300, then the batch of logs failed to push and log data was lost. If you want to count the total number of logs that succeeded or failed, you should always set final = 1.

ZoneWaitingRoomAnalyticsAdaptiveGroupsMi.totalQueuedUsers: The minimum value of total number of queued users. A negative number means no data
ZoneWaitingRoomAnalyticsAdaptiveGroupsMi.turnstileFailures: The minimum number of users seen who failed to complete a Turnstile challenge and therefore are likely bots. These users are placed in the infinite queue if enabled. A negative number means no data
ZoneWaitingRoomAnalyticsAdaptiveGroupsMi.turnstileInfiniteQueueRefreshes: The minimum value of requests from users who failed to complete a Turnstile challenge and were placed in an infinite queue. A negative number means no data
ZoneWaitingRoomAnalyticsAdaptiveGroupsMi.turnstileIssued: The minimum number of times a Turnstile challenge was included in the HTML sent to a user. A negative number means no data
ZoneWaitingRoomAnalyticsAdaptiveGroupsMi.turnstileSuccesses: The minimum number of users seen who solved a Turnstile challenge and therefore are likely human. These users are placed in the normal queue. A negative number means no data
ZoneWaitingRoomAnalyticsAdaptiveGroupsMi.turnstileUnsolved: The minimum number of users seen who didn't attempt a Turnstile challenge and therefore might be bots. These users will continue to be challenged with every request until they either pass or fail the challenge. A negative number means no data

ZoneWaitingRoomAnalyticsAdaptiveGroupsSu.newUsersPerMinute: Sum of new users per minute. A negative number means no data
ZoneWaitingRoomAnalyticsAdaptiveGroupsSu.sessionsRevoked: Sum of sessions revoked. A negative number means no data
ZoneWaitingRoomAnalyticsAdaptiveGroupsSu.turnstileFailures: Sum of users seen who failed to complete a Turnstile challenge and therefore are likely bots. These users are placed in the infinite queue if enabled. A negative number means no data
ZoneWaitingRoomAnalyticsAdaptiveGroupsSu.turnstileInfiniteQueueRefreshes: Sum of requests from users who failed to complete a Turnstile challenge and were placed in an infinite queue. A negative number means no data
ZoneWaitingRoomAnalyticsAdaptiveGroupsSu.turnstileIssued: Sum of times a Turnstile challenge was included in the HTML sent to a user. A negative number means no data
ZoneWaitingRoomAnalyticsAdaptiveGroupsSu.turnstileSuccesses: Sum of users seen who solved a Turnstile challenge and therefore are likely human. These users are placed in the normal queue. A negative number means no data
ZoneWaitingRoomAnalyticsAdaptiveGroupsSu.turnstileUnsolved: Sum of users seen who didn't attempt a Turnstile challenge and therefore might be bots. These users will continue to be challenged with every request until they either pass or fail the challenge. A negative number means no data
